content: The Power Of A God CANNOT BE OVERCURVE! Xan'Za.. This IS THE PROVIDENCE OF THE WORLD. EVEN GOD'S ARE MERELY BEINGS RESTRICTED TO THE LIMITED POWER.. ...DETERMINED BY PROVIDE THAT POWER. Although great.. ..Is NOT UNLIMITED. THE VOICE, ABBUS!! HOW DARE YOU DISABBE-E? I AM MANADA. i was HERE at the begining And i will proclaim THE END. But THAT'S INPOSSIBLE!! SHUK.. IT IS TIME FOR YOU TO CHOOSE. Does this world belong ZANZA? Or does it belong to you. That Is something I decided long ago. We use our POWER TO FELL A GOD, AND THEN THEES ARE DESTINY. It's FADE The MEMORY OF A GOD'S EXISTENCE, Born From The Chaos Of Creation IT IS
